payload.subtitle: A premium conversational assistant strategy for Acme Client.
payload.objective: Design and launch an animated chatbot for acme-client.com that improves response quality, qualification speed, and conversion confidence.
payload.clientSituation:
Acme Client loses momentum when visitors cannot get instant answers on acme-client.com.
Support and pre-sales requests are repeated manually across channels.
Current automated journeys lack distinctive brand voice and visual character.
payload.conceptPillars:
Build an animated chatbot persona aligned with Notso AI brand expression.
Guide users through concise decision paths with clear outcomes in each turn.
Make copy and prompts easy to update so the concept evolves without redesigning slides.
payload.experienceDesign:
Design language combines high-contrast readability with calm, premium motion.
Primary interactions prioritize quick intent routing and obvious next actions.
Component system supports future channels while preserving consistent UX behavior.
payload.conversationDesign:
Opening script establishes value in two exchanges and offers focused intent options.
Mid-flow logic handles FAQs, qualification, and objections with adaptive follow-ups.
Fallback logic escalates to human support with complete conversation context.
payload.architecture:
Widget layer, orchestration layer, and analytics layer remain cleanly separated.
Prompt/content management can be updated by non-technical stakeholders.
Telemetry tracks intent usage, drop-offs, and conversion influence per flow.
payload.designOptions:
Option A - Brand Mascot :: Friendly character-led interface with expressive motion cues.
Option B - Premium Concierge :: Elegant assistant aesthetic with restrained animation.
Option C - Product Specialist :: Utility-first UI with rapid decision support.
payload.timeline:
Week 1-2 :: Discovery, baseline metrics, and outcome framing.
Week 3-4 :: Concept storyboard, visual direction, and scripted prototype.
Week 5-6 :: Production implementation, integration, and QA.
Week 7 :: Launch preparation, enablement, and optimization backlog.
payload.pricing:
Starter :: EUR 8.500 :: Core assistant experience, 3 user flows, launch setup.
Growth :: EUR 14.500 :: Expanded flows, richer animation system, analytics dashboard.
Scale :: EUR 22.000 :: Multi-language rollout, CRM integrations, optimization loop.
payload.team:
Strategy Lead :: Owns problem framing, priorities, and decision velocity.
Conversation Designer :: Designs scripts, guardrails, and fallback behavior.
Motion/UI Designer :: Crafts visual identity and animated interaction language.
Implementation Engineer :: Delivers integration, release hardening, and monitoring.
payload.nextSteps:
Confirm direction, package, and decision stakeholders.
Run kickoff workshop and validate measurable success criteria.
Approve final scope and begin discovery sprint immediately.
